programs.title: CBS Evening News
programs.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programs.title: CBS News Roundup
programs.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programs.title: CBS News Mornings
programs.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.
